div.class: bg-surface border border-border rounded-theme p-5 mb-[30px] shadow-card animate-[bookmarkFadeIn_0.4s_ease]

button.class: bg-transparent border border-border text-muted py-1 px-3 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary hover:border-primary hover:text-bg transition-fast

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-5 mb-[35px]
